description_long: This is a large, rectangular cardboard shipping box with a natural brown color and printed branding from Meneau, a company known for organic products. The box features various product and certification labels, including 'BIO Equitable' and 'Fair for Life', as well as a prominent label indicating it contains 'Sirop de Fraise' (strawberry syrup). The surface is matte and slightly rough, typical of corrugated cardboard, with dark brown printed text and graphics on multiple sides. The box appears to be sealed and is likely used for bulk transport or storage of bottled goods. Its size and construction suggest it is designed to be stackable and durable for shipping or storage in urban environments.
description: A large, brown cardboard shipping box with Meneau branding and product labels, designed for transporting organic strawberry syrup. The box features printed certifications and a prominent product label on one side.
description_view_0: This view shows the top and two sides of the box, highlighting the 'BIO Equitable' label and certification graphics.
description_view_1: This view displays the front with the large 'Sirop de Fraise' product label and Meneau branding, making it the most visually informative side.
description_view_2: This angle shows the product label partially and more of the side text, including additional branding and product information.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the side with multiple certification logos and detailed product information, with no large product label visible.
